---
title: "Macular Degeneration"
author: "Cooper Riggs, Adam Bitner, & Stockton Nelson"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Setup

```{r}
#Downloading Libraries
library(tidyverse)

#Bringing in Data
eyes <- vroom::vroom("ARMD.txt") |>
  janitor::clean_names() 
```

## Problem 1 (Stockton)

### EDA

```{r}

```

## Problem 2 (Cooper)

### Modeling

```{r}

```

## Problem 3 (Adam)

### Inference

```{r}

```

## Problem 4 (Adam)

### Prediction

```{r}

```
